介： 【双穿越 + 工业革命 VS 生化变异 + 废后逆袭 + 战争史诗】

21世纪高分子材料学专家沈宁，穿越成大梁废后，开局流放北疆苦寒之地。 本以为是地狱开局，她却手握工业大百科，在冻土之上建立起一座钢铁之城——凛冬。 炼钢、烧水泥、造枪炮、搞基建…… 她本以为这是一场单机版的“文明建设”游戏，只要攀科技树就能横扫六国。

直到那天，绿色的毒雾笼罩了边境，数万不死军团像丧尸般涌来。 沈宁才惊恐地发现，这个世界还有另一个玩家。

苏白，顶尖化学天才，一个从乱葬岗爬出来的疯子，西楚帝国的幕后黑手。 他不需要钢铁，他信奉化学。 他用海洛因控制皇权，用毒气弹收割生命，用生化病毒制造亡灵大军。

沈宁： “我要给这个世界带来光和热，带来工业文明的秩序。” 苏白： “太吵了。我要让这个世界安静下来，变成我培养皿里的标本。”

当钢铁洪流撞上生化狂潮，当重工业对决黑魔法。 这不再是争夺皇位的宫斗，而是两种现代意志在异世界的生死存亡之战！

“对于制造毒品的国家，没有国界，只有射程！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o62789637ec15e7af5f9569a8551bed2c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"老王不吃鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7600049599054629912","book_name":"让你流放，没让你在北疆当女帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":84,"name":"皇后","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=84&name=皇后&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7600049602640757272","read_count":"559","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"260097"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"120","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,皇后,天才,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o62789637ec15e7af5f9569a8551bed2c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440347&x-signature=WQchpPS3RiEoWaQ5U8s2FUI8SNo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"84703310629","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"15"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323165906A65A3F9F19009FCB160F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"l
